latestPosts.caption:
I tried this mouse thinking it’s just another productivity upgrade.

Didn’t expect it to keep up with… everything.

Design, focus, random late-night switches in vibe.
It just stayed consistent while I kept changing.

At some point, you stop noticing the tool.
That’s when it gets interesting.

Now I’m just curious…
how far can one mouse actually go?

#designer #mxmaster4 #productivity

Spotted something on the KKR jersey that I can’t unsee.

A sponsor logo that accidentally reads as another team’s name. Not because the logo is bad. Because in the IPL, two-letter abbreviations already mean something.

Design lesson: context rewrites meaning. Always check what else lives in the same space as your work.
Tell me you saw this too.

The wait is over! Announcing the 3 winners of the @logitech 4 giveaway. Swipe through. 
Congratulations, winners! Someone from my team will reach out to you soon 😇

Thank you everyone for participating. Many comments were simply hilarious! I wish I could give away more. But I had to pick only 3.

latestPosts.caption:
If You Can Build Fast, This Room Is For You 🔥

This reel is about VibeCon India in Bangalore, where just 300 people from across the country get in, build live, and the winner walks away with a direct Y Combinator interview, cash prizes, investor access from YC, Lightspeed, Razorpay, and even a billboard in Bangalore. 
It’s a filtered room of designers who can ship, founders who can build, and operators who actually execute, and if you believe you belong in that room.
.
.
Hashtags:
#startup #ycombinator #bangalore #buildinpublic
.
.

Replit’s Agent 4 is insane 😍

This video shows how Replit Agent 4 collapses the old design-to-code handoff into one flow. The big shift is that design, backend, logic, and even extra outputs like mobile apps, slides, and animations can now live inside one project, so you think, design, and build at the same time instead of bouncing between tools. It’s basically the first time coding starts to feel like creative work instead of a handoff problem
.
.
#replit #replitagent4 #productdesign #aitools
.
.

India’s first MUSICAL road! 🎶

This video showcases India’s first melody road built on the coastal road in Mumbai. The road plays the song “Jai Ho” the moment a vehicle passes by.
 
No speakers, just specially designed strips under the tyres that turn vibrations into music.
.
.
#musicalroad #jaihoroad #mumbai #design
.
.

latestPosts.caption:
🚧 GIVEAWAY CLOSED 🚧

I might be getting crushed by this Logitech MX Master 4, but one (or more) of you won’t — you’ll actually win it.

If you spend hours on a laptop, you know how big the difference a great mouse makes. The MX Master series is basically the Rolls Royce of productivity mice.

So I thought… why not give some away?

🎁 Up for grabs: Logitech MX Master 4
👀 Winners: 1 (maybe more… depending on how crazy this gets)

⸻

How to Participate

1️⃣ Follow this page
2️⃣ Like this post
3️⃣ Write the best caption for this image in the comments
4️⃣ Tag a friend who spends too much time on their laptop

The funniest / smartest caption wins the mouse.

(Optional but appreciated): Share this post in your story.

⸻
Let’s see who writes the caption that saves my life.

#Giveaway #Logitech #MXMaster #CaptionThis #ProductivitySetup

latestPosts.caption:
What If EVERYTHING was a Brand Logo? 😍

Imagine a world where every building, car, and character is a real brand logo. 
Advertising literally becomes the world itself. This brilliant concept was brought 
To life in the short film LOGORAMA, and it even won an Oscar. 
.
.
#logorama #design #oscars #animation
.
.

Your Next User Isn’t Human. It’s an AI Agent. 🤖

This reel explains the future of product design, which isn’t just about designing interfaces anymore.
It’s about designing systems that machines can use. While humans interact with screens, buttons & UI, AI agents interact through APIs, structured data & system states. 
.
.
#uxdesign #aiagents #productdesign #futureofux
.

I Got Tired of Screenshot Moodboards, So I Built My Own Tool 😎
OR
One Problem → One Tool → Real Leverage 🔥

In this video, I used Emergent to build VibeFrame: an AI‑powered moodboard app that takes a prompt or a few UI screenshots and auto-generates visual direction, color palettes, typography, layout ideas, components, and keywords in one clean board for designers and product teams. 
One problem. One tool. Immediate value.
If you’re also wondering where to start, pick one problem and build the first version this week.
Comment “APP”, and I’ll share the link with you in DM.
.
.
#emergentai #uidesign #aiforcreators #buildinpublic
